get.summary:
Get List of ActivityReference
            Gets activities associated to the ticket
            Please use the /sales/activities?conditions=ticket/id={id} endpoint

Get Count of ActivityReference
            Gets count of activities associated to the ticket
            Please use the /sales/activities/count?conditions=ticket/id={id} endpoint

Get List of DocumentReference
            Gets the documents associated to the ticket
            Please use the /system/documents?recordType=Ticket&recordId={id} endpoint

Get List of ProductReference
            Gets the products associated to the ticket
            Please use the /procurement/products?conditions=chargeToType='Ticket' AND chargeToId={id} endpoint

Get Count of ProductReference
            Gets the products associated to the ticket
            Please use the /procurement/products/count?conditions=chargeToType='Ticket' AND chargeToId={id} endpoint

Get List of ScheduleEntryReference
            Gets the schedule entries associated to the ticket
            Please use the /schedule/entries?conditions=type/id=4 AND objectId={id} endpoint

Get Count of ScheduleEntryReference
            Gets the schedule entries count associated to the ticket
            Please use the /schedule/entries/count?conditions=type/id=4 AND objectId={id} endpoint

Get List of TimeEntryReference
            Gets time entries associated to the ticket
            Please use the /time/entries?conditions=(chargeToType="ServiceTicket" OR chargeToType="ProjectTicket") AND chargeToId={id} endpoint

Get Count of TimeEntryReference
            Gets time entries count associated to the ticket
            Please use the /time/entries/count?conditions=(chargeToType="ServiceTicket" OR chargeToType="ProjectTicket") AND chargeToId={id} endpoint

Get List of ConnectWise.Apis.v3_0.v2015_3.Service.Ticket.Ticket
            To obtain the current SLA times for an active ticket, please use the /service/tickets/calculateSLA endpoint for multiple tickets or /service/tickets/{id} for individual tickets.

Get List of ActivityReference
            Gets activities associated to the ticket
            Please use the /sales/activities?conditions=ticket/id={id} endpoint

Get Count of ActivityReference
            Gets count of activities associated to the ticket
            Please use the /sales/activities/count?conditions=ticket/id={id} endpoint

Get List of DocumentReference
            Gets the documents associated to the ticket
            Please use the /system/documents?recordType=Ticket&recordId={id} endpoint

Get List of ProductReference
            Gets the products associated to the ticket
            Please use the /procurement/products?conditions=chargeToType='Ticket' AND chargeToId={id} endpoint

Get Count of ProductReference
            Gets the products associated to the ticket
            Please use the /procurement/products/count?conditions=chargeToType='Ticket' AND chargeToId={id} endpoint

Get List of ScheduleEntryReference
            Gets the schedule entries associated to the ticket
            Please use the /schedule/entries?conditions=type/id=4 AND objectId={id} endpoint

Get Count of ScheduleEntryReference
            Gets the schedule entries count associated to the ticket
            Please use the /schedule/entries/count?conditions=type/id=4 AND objectId={id} endpoint

Get List of TimeEntryReference
            Gets time entries associated to the ticket
            Please use the /time/entries?conditions=(chargeToType="ServiceTicket" OR chargeToType="ProjectTicket") AND chargeToId={id} endpoint

Get Count of TimeEntryReference
            Gets time entries count associated to the ticket
            Please use the /time/entries/count?conditions=(chargeToType="ServiceTicket" OR chargeToType="ProjectTicket") AND chargeToId={id} endpoint
Get List of ConnectWise.Apis.v3_0.v2015_3.Service.Ticket.Ticket with SLA calculated
Get List of Ticket Change Log
Get List of Member to be use for calendar sync subscriptions

200.description: List of Member for calendar sync

addAllAgreementExclusions.description: Used only on create to add the work role to all agreement and agreement type exclusion lists

id.description: Gets or sets invoice Template Setup Id.

initialDescription.description: Only available for POST, will not be returned in the response.

initialInternalAnalysis.description: Only available for POST, will not be returned in the response.

initialResolution.description: Only available for POST, will not be returned in the response.

processNotifications.description: Can be set to false to skip notification processing when adding or updating a ticket (Defaults to True).

resolveMinutes.description: To obtain the current SLA times for an active ticket, please use the /service/tickets/calculateSLA endpoint for multiple tickets or /service/tickets/{id} for individual tickets.

resPlanMinutes.description: To obtain the current SLA times for an active ticket, please use the /service/tickets/calculateSLA endpoint for multiple tickets or /service/tickets/{id} for individual tickets.

respondMinutes.description: To obtain the current SLA times for an active ticket, please use the /service/tickets/calculateSLA endpoint for multiple tickets or /service/tickets/{id} for individual tickets.

respondByGoalUTC.description: To obtain the current SLA times for an active ticket, please use the /service/tickets/calculateSLA endpoint for multiple tickets or /service/tickets/{id} for individual tickets.

resplanGoalUTC.description: To obtain the current SLA times for an active ticket, please use the /service/tickets/calculateSLA endpoint for multiple tickets or /service/tickets/{id} for individual tickets.

resolutionGoalUTC.description: To obtain the current SLA times for an active ticket, please use the /service/tickets/calculateSLA endpoint for multiple tickets or /service/tickets/{id} for individual tickets.

escalationLastUpdateMinutes.description: To obtain the current SLA times for an active ticket, please use the /service/tickets/calculateSLA endpoint for multiple tickets or /service/tickets/{id} for individual tickets.

vacationFlag.description: if vacationFlag is set to false, system will clear out or ingore the values of vacationAvailableType, vacationCarryoverAllowedFlag, vacationCarryoverLimit

sickFlag.description: if sickFlag is set to false, system will clear out or ignore the values of sickAvailableType, sickCarryoverAllowedFlag, sickCarryoverLimit

ptoFlag.description: if ptoFlag is set to false, system will clear out or ignore the values of ptoAvailableType, ptoCarryoverAllowedFlag, ptoCarryoverLimit

holidayFlag.description: if holidayFlag is set to false, system will clear out or ignore the values of holidayAvailableType, holidayCarryoverAllowedFlag, holidayCarryoverLimit

endDate.description:
The Recurring End Date is calculated based on the
            start date, number of cycles, and cycle type.

showDependenciesFlag.description: This field only shows if it is Project Board.

showEstimatesFlag.description: This field only shows if it is Project Board.

emailConnectorReopenResourcesFlag.description: This field can only be set when emailConnectorAllowReopenClosed is true.

emailConnectorNewTicketNoMatchFlag.description: This field can only be set when emailConnectorAllowReopenClosed is true.

emailConnectorNeverReopenByDaysFlag.description: This field can only be set when emailConnectorAllowReopenClosed is true.

emailConnectorReopenDaysLimit.description:
This field can only be set when emailConnectorNeverReopenByDaysFlag and emailConnectorAllowReopenClosed are both true
            This field is required when emailConnectorNeverReopenByDaysFlag is true.

emailConnectorNeverReopenByDaysClosedFla.description: This field can only be set when emailConnectorAllowReopenClosed is true.

emailConnectorReopenDaysClosedLimit.description:
This field can only be set when emailConnectorNeverReopenByDaysClosedFlag and emailConnectorAllowReopenClosed are both true
            This field is required when emailConnectorNeverReopenByDaysClosedFlag is true.

autoAssignLimitAmount.description: This field can only be set when autoAssignLimitFlag is true

typeIds.description:
Gets or sets integrer array of Contact_Type_Recids to be assigned to contact that can be passed in only during new contact creation (post)
            To update existing contacts type, use the /company/contactTypeAssociations or /company/contacts/{ID}/typeAssociations endpoints.

addressLine1.description: Gets or sets at least one address field is required -- addressLine1, addressLine2, city, state, zip and/or country. Max length: 50;

addressLine2.description: Gets or sets at least one address field is required -- addressLine1, addressLine2, city, state, zip and/or country. Max length: 50;

city.description: Gets or sets at least one address field is required -- addressLine1, addressLine2, city, state, zip and/or country. Max length: 50;

state.description: Gets or sets at least one address field is required -- addressLine1, addressLine2, city, state, zip and/or country. Max length: 50;

zip.description: Gets or sets at least one address field is required -- addressLine1, addressLine2, city, state, zip and/or country. Max length: 12;

types.description:
Gets or sets integrer array of Company_Type_Recids to be assigned to company that can be passed in only during new company creation (post)
            To update existing companies type, use the /company/companyTypeAssociations or /company/companies/{ID}/typeAssociations endpoints.

chargeToId.description: If chargeToId is not specified, we asume you enter time against the company specified

chargeToType.description: If chargeToId is not specified, we asume you enter time against the company specified

emailResourceFlag.description: This is an action flag. To update this value use the /service/tickets endpoint automaticEmailResourceFlag field

emailContactFlag.description: This is an action flag. To update this value use the /service/tickets endpoint automaticEmailContactFlag field

emailCcFlag.description: This is an action flag. To update this value use the /service/tickets endpoint automaticEmailCcFlag field

emailCc.description: To update this value use the /service/tickets endpoint automaticEmailCc field

hourlyRate.description: This field may only be Updated, it is defaulted on Create

billingMethod.description: billingMethod is required if the phase billSeparatelyFlag is true.

billPhaseClosedFlag.description: This phase can only be billed after it has been closed.

billProjectClosedFlag.description: This phase can only be billed after the project has been closed.

customStatusIndicatorName.description: Required when statusIndicator is Custom. Max length: 30;

addAllAgreementExclusions.description: Used only on create to add the work type to all agreement and agreement type exclusion lists

password.description: ConditionallyRequired. API Member will get random password generated Max length: 60;

licenseClass.description: F = Full Member, A = API Member, C = StreamlineIT Member, X = Subcontractor Member

templateSetupId.description: Can be obtained via InvoiceTemplate report.

emailTemplateId.description: Can be obtained via InvoiceEmailTemplate report.

departmentId.description: departmentId is only required for special invoices.

initialDescription.description: Only available for POST, will not be returned in the response.

initialInternalAnalysis.description: Only available for POST, will not be returned in the response.

initialResolution.description: Only available for POST, will not be returned in the response.

processNotifications.description: Can be set to false to skip notification processing when adding or updating a ticket (Defaults to True).
